title: Careersdetails/:1 Access to fetch at 'https://api.monday.com/v2/file' from origin 'http://localhost:8000' has been blocked by CORS policy: Response to preflight request doesn't pass access control check: No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header is present
excerpt: Hello, please check issues, When i have uploading file in client side to the monday board then getting cors error.

posts.author: Prathmesh27 (Prathmesh)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, please check issues, When i have uploading file in client side to the monday board then getting cors error.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

This looks like an issue that is specific to your account that our support team should take a look into. Could you send us a DM on any of our social media platforms with a screen recording of the issue? You can also reach us here!

Thanks so much! Looking forward to hearing from you and getting this resolved!
